title: CapSched project overlay ledger row schema
purpose: Normalize heterogeneous source-map and drift rows into a central source-only overlay ledger without rewriting N-series history.

row_shape.row_id: stable row id for this generated overlay ledger
n_ids: N id for the normalization work, not the historical semantic work item
artifact_paths: source artifact path from the input drift row

source_context.extraction_kind: how the source anchor was extracted
source_context.forbidden_upgrade: why this row cannot become authority

long_horizon.long_horizon_invariant: source anchors are traceability, not authority
long_horizon.future_monitor_responsibility: must be supplied by layer-specific design, not inferred from source maps

linux_anchors.source_path: linux repository relative path or none
linux_anchors.drift_status: ok | gap | path_changed | symbol_missing | pattern_missing | semantic_recheck_required | unknown

hard_rules: The ledger is an interpretation layer over historical artifacts; it must not rewrite N-series history.
Every row remains source_only unless a separate validation artifact changes the evidence class.
A gap row is preserved as a gap and does not remove the semantic obligation.
Line-only anchors require semantic recheck and must not be counted as semantic matches.
ok means the declared source predicate was checked, not that the design is safe.
